# <img src="web_help_files/pubg_lite_logo.png" width="40" height="40" />   OG:Battlegrounds Lite. | lobby and Online Services
PUBG LITE game reverse engineering, for educational purposes.  

# NOTE! The batch file was specified to delete local files generated by 0.7.0.1, so ignore anything that starts with ```Ɛ```.

you can use this branch's page as lobby url  

## parameter that uses online URL
**```PUBGLite-Win64-Shipping.exe -UI -LobbyUrl="https://phikill.github.io/RE_PUBG_LITE/custom_lobby/index.html" -AllowJoinAnyMatchState -LOG -NOSPLASH```**

You can also play **offline** by placing **```custom_lobby```** and **```start_local_lobby.bat```** in the same directory as the main game binary, **```Client/ShadowTrackerExtra/Binaries/Win64```**

## **files for offline use, local files**


It also has the batch file **```start_local_lobby_server.bat```** this batch file contains the parameter -nosound.


Your **```Win64```** directory will look something like this.

  
> **Win64/custom_lobby**  
> **Win64/lpc_server.exe**  
> **Win64/PUBGLite-Win64-Shipping.exe**  
> **Win64/start_local_lobby.bat**  
> **Win64/start_local_lobby_server.bat**  

### ***Works on all versions of the game***
